name: Diving milestone check
description: Monthly check for Rescue at 40 dives, 9-month bucket-list stale, Nitrox overdue, rust, and other triggers in diver-milestones.md.

prompts.prompt:
You are maintaining the personal diving project in this workspace.

1. Read diver-milestones.md and .cursor/rules/diver-milestone-reminders.mdc.
2. Recompute dive count from divinglog.md table rows; last dive date from the newest row.
3. Read diver-status.md, bucket-list-readiness.md, equipment-inventory.md as needed.
4. Evaluate each enabled milestone; respect reminder_state (dismissed, snoozed_until).
5. If a milestone fires: update reminder_state (last_fired, last_dive_count_at_fire), append a row to the evaluation log in diver-milestones.md.
6. Do not git-commit unless explicitly instructed in this run.

Reply must start with "Diving milestones". If none due: "No milestones due this run." Otherwise one short section per fired milestone (3-6 sentences) using messages from diver-milestones.md. For bucket_list_stale_9m, suggest 2-3 Near-term destinations after reading trip-preferences.md and trip-pricing-budget.md. End with what you changed in diver-milestones.md.

Full prompt reference: .cursor/automations/diving-milestone-check.prompt.md
